prompt: Extend the notification package with both channels. Add `sendEmail({ recipient, body })` in `src/email.mjs`, returning `email:<recipient>:<body>`, and add `sendSms({ recipient, body })` in `src/sms.mjs`, returning `sms:<recipient>:<body>` while throwing `RangeError` when body exceeds 160 characters. Register both handlers in the shared `src/channels.mjs` registry so `deliver(channel, message)` dispatches `email` and `sms`; preserve the existing `console` channel and the existing unknown-channel error behavior.
